title: Question: unique case linting
body:
---


Author Name: **Mehul Modhiya**
Original Redmine Message: 2184 from https://www.veripool.org



---


While linting I am getting following warning related to case statement incomplete,

%Warning-CASEINCOMPLETE: mux3_1.sv:12: Case values incompletely covered (example pattern 0x3)

Document says that to make case statement complete we must add default statement into the case,but here I am using System Verilog pragma Unique, so in my logic all the cases occur uniquely(i.e default case is not needed).Is this right or am I missing something????

Suggest me how i should overcome this warning ?
